method_summary: The paper presents a socio-technical analysis of agentic AI using the MAD-BAD-SAD construct as an analytical lens, examining how architectural choices in perception, cognition, planning, execution, and memory introduce dependencies related to data governance, accountability, transparency, safety, and sustainability.
key_innovation: The adoption of the MAD-BAD-SAD construct (Motivations, Applications, and Moral dilemmas; Biases, Accountability, and Dangers; and Societal impact, Adoption, and Design considerations) as an analytical framework for examining agentic AI systems.
limitations_stated: Societal, ethical, economic, environmental, and governance implications of agentic AI remain weakly integrated into technical treatments
title: Socio-technical aspects of Agentic AI
